prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `f1bcbc2c`.
codex_response:
Implemented `f1bcbc2c` in [task_f1bcbc2c](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f1bcbc2c). The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f1bcbc2c/verifier.py#L11) fills the unique one-cell corridor of `0/9` cells bounded by `7`s; a straight-segment `9` is absorbed into the filled corridor, while a corner `9` stays unchanged and only the upper branch is filled. The generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f1bcbc2c/generator.py#L79) builds the corridor first, derives the official-style `7` wall traces from that latent path, and samples no-marker, straight-marker, and corner-marker variants. I used task-local helpers in [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f1bcbc2c/helpers.py); no new reusable primitive was needed, so `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was left untouched.

Hint handling is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f1bcbc2c/notes.md): the Opus summary was used as a starting hypothesis but corrected for the corner-marker case, and the Sonnet summary was discarded because its “vertical tube fill” description does not match the turning-corridor examples.

Validation passed end to end: `5/5` official examples, build of `1000` examples, and `1000/1000` generated examples verified. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f1bcbc2c/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f1bcbc2c/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f1bcbc2c/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f1bcbc2c/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f1bcbc2c/previews/preview_03.png).
